title: Cutting, Punching, and Press Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines to saw, cut, shear, slit, punch, crimp, notch, bend, or straighten metal or plastic material.

tasks.text: Measure completed workpieces to verify conformance to specifications, using micrometers, gauges, calipers, templates, or rulers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine completed workpieces for defects, such as chipped edges or marred surfaces and sort defective pieces according to types of flaws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read work orders or production schedules to determine specifications, such as materials to be used, locations of cutting lines, or dimensions and tolerances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start machines, monitor their operations, and record operational data.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Set up, operate, or tend machines to saw, cut, shear, slit, punch, crimp, notch, bend, or straighten metal or plastic material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test and adjust machine speeds or actions, according to product specifications, using gauges and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load workpieces, plastic material, or chemical solutions into machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn controls to set cutting speeds, feed rates, or table angles for specified operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean work area.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lubricate workpieces with oil.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, align, and lock specified punches, dies, cutting blades, or other fixtures in rams or beds of machines, using gauges, templates, feelers, shims, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust ram strokes of presses to specified lengths, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position, align, and secure workpieces against fixtures or stops on machine beds or on dies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set stops on machine beds, change dies, and adjust components, such as rams or power presses, when making multiple or successive passes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and lubricate machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position guides, stops, holding blocks, or other fixtures to secure and direct workpieces, using hand tools and measuring devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Place workpieces on cutting tables, manually or using hoists, cranes, or sledges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace defective blades or wheels, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan sequences of operations, applying knowledge of physical properties of workpiece materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mark identifying data on workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves to start flow of coolant against cutting areas or to start airflow that blows cuttings away from kerfs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hone cutters with oilstones to remove nicks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove housings, feed tubes, tool holders, or other accessories to replace worn or broken parts, such as springs or bushings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sharpen dulled blades, using bench grinders, abrasive wheels, or lathes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate forklifts to deliver materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, clean, and install spacers, rubber sleeves, or cutters on arbors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scribe reference lines on workpieces as guides for cutting operations, according to blueprints, templates, sample parts, or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Grind out burrs or sharp edges, using portable grinders, speed lathes, or polishing jacks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set blade tensions, heights, and angles to perform prescribed cuts, using wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use equipment designed to join sheet metal, such as spot welders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Preheat workpieces, using heating furnaces or hand torches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
